svg.text: Intune Remediation · Collect → Schedule → Decide → Act → Report

g.text: ③ Check user calendar for free slots
④ Consult AI agent for directives
• User must approve before actions execute
Intune deploys remediation script to device (daily schedule)
Device authenticates to Entra ID via client credentials (2 service principals)
Collect device compliance, detected apps, non-compliant policies, and user calendar
Send aggregated device state to Foundry AI Agent for analysis
Agent returns action directives (restart, remove app)
Log all events to Cosmos DB (DeviceEvents container)
Send telemetry and traces to Application Insights (optional)
Device requests user approval via toast/dialog before executing actions
Runs in USER context via Intune Remediation · PowerShell 5.1 · TLS 1.2 · No browser/interactive prompts for auth
Graph: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All, DeviceManagementConfiguration.Read.All, Calendars.Read, User.Read.All · Foundry: ai.azure.com · Cosmos: cosmos.azure.com
